In [1]:
from glob import glob
import pandas as pd
import cv2
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
In [2]:
csvPaths = glob('/root/dataBackup/hirano/brainCT/ws1/makeDataset/dataset/1/merged_csv/*.csv')
csvPaths += glob('/root/dataBackup/hirano/brainCT/ws1/makeDataset/dataset/2/merged_csv/*.csv')
df = pd.DataFrame()
for i, csvPath in enumerate(csvPaths):
    df = pd.concat([df, pd.read_csv(csvPath)], axis=0)
dfHematoma = df[(df['usable']==1) & (df['hematomaArea']>0)]

nb_plot = 30
In [3]:
dfBlend = dfHematoma[
    (dfHematoma['hypodensity']==0) &
    (dfHematoma['irregular']==0) &
    (dfHematoma['blend']==1) &
    (dfHematoma['fluid']==0)
]
dfBlend = dfBlend.sample(frac=1, random_state=123)
In [4]:
for i, (_, row) in enumerate(dfBlend.iterrows()):
    hospitalID = row['imgPath'].split('/')[7]
    patientID, date, location, imgIdx = row['patientID'], row['date'], row['location'], row['idx']
    print(f'hospitalID : {hospitalID}')
    print(f'patientID : {patientID}')
    print(f'date : {date}')
    print(f'location : {location}')
    print(f'imgIdx : {imgIdx}')
    
    img = cv2.imread(row['imgPath'].replace('brainCT', 'brainCT/ws1'), 0)
    plt.figure()
    plt.imshow(img, cmap='gray')
    plt.show()

    if i==nb_plot:
        break
